_meta.comment: All user-visible text lives here. Add new language files (es.json, fr.json, etc.) as siblings. Loaded by godot/scripts/text.gd autoload; access via Text.get('main_menu.title'). Templates use {placeholder} substitution via Text.format('key', {var: value}).

level.hint: drag to steer. tap MENU to leave.
